source_boundary: Only assets generated for this workspace are used by the app.
art_direction: Adult feminine wicked jester, elegant and seductive without performance cliche, deep purple personal underworld, no dragon in first scene, no performance venue, no monarchic setting, no sacred setting, no medieval sorcerer setting, no cathedral/church architecture, no theater/stage framing.
layering_strategy: Generated background and character are separate assets. Motion, foreground haze, lighting, parallax, depth and eye/cloth micro-movement are produced by the WebGL app.
application_strategy: The first app shell is a compact presence dock: a user-facing identity/affinity seed that can influence atmosphere without badges, farming, mini-games, rewards, streamer overlays, or visible tutorial text.

runtime_visual_system.camera: Constrained single-axis cardinal rail with left/right and up/down reveal, no free 360 orbit; diagonal cursor input resolves to one rail only with zero visible cross-axis leak.
runtime_visual_system.touch_input: Mobile touch uses relative drag with smoothed catch-up and a no-teleport gate; finger placement does not jump the viewpoint and fast drag eases into the same final camera amplitude.
runtime_visual_system.anchoring: Character feet are projected from a background-layer point at the center floor circle.
runtime_visual_system.cardinal_reveal: Code-generated reveal shutters, side glints, top wires, and floor sheens follow the same camera axis, adding left/right/up/down discovery without moving the character.
runtime_visual_system.peripheral_focus: Code-generated optical aperture threads and depth ellipses reinforce an entering-the-space sensation while keeping the central character and floor anchor clear.
runtime_visual_system.volumetric_depth: Axis-bound slit haze and fine luminous cuts add atmospheric depth while avoiding stage lighting, sacred rays, or character-lane clutter.
runtime_visual_system.threshold_lens: Code-generated floor and air depth lines around the central circle create a private threshold feeling without sacred, stage, royal, or medieval symbols.
runtime_visual_system.threshold_pressure: Code-generated peripheral pressure threads and floor cuts respond to the same camera rail, adding living tension around the room while protecting the subject lane from visual clutter.
runtime_visual_system.depth_shear: Code-generated anamorphic side and floor traces follow the active camera rail, adding cinematic depth without UI, stage beams, central haze, or external assets.
runtime_visual_system.side_depth_separation: Code-generated cinematic side planes and fine glints sculpt side depth, preserving the central clarity lane and staying behind the character.
runtime_visual_system.presence_memory: A code-generated non-UI directional trace lets the room remember exploration subtly, forming a future concept seed without badges, rewards, quests, or streamer overlays.
runtime_visual_system.subject_matte: A blurred negative-fill matte behind the generated character sculpts premium subject clarity without becoming a black halo or stage spotlight.
runtime_visual_system.contact_reflection: A subtle mirrored reflection of the generated character texture is compressed into the floor plane and follows the projected foot anchor for premium grounding.
runtime_visual_system.contact_pressure: Code-generated foot/floor contact pressure deepens the character's grounding while avoiding ritual-circle, stage-mark, UI, or badge language.
runtime_visual_system.surface_resonance: Code-generated floor surface resonance combines multiply depth and additive micro-reflections for premium wet/specular material without washing the scene pale.
runtime_visual_system.character_rim: Subtle dual-tone blurred copies of the generated character texture sit behind the main sprite for premium silhouette separation without changing pose or anatomy.
runtime_visual_system.subject_lustre: Code-generated pose-locked micro-glints live on the character's costume detail, adding premium motion without UI, reward, badge, or stage-light language.
runtime_visual_system.lens_fringe: Code-generated edge-only prismatic lens fringe follows the active camera rail, adding optical depth while protecting the character and clarity lane.
runtime_visual_system.cinematic_grain: Code-generated tiled grain adds subtle premium material texture as a post-process while preserving central clarity and requiring no external assets.
runtime_visual_system.deep_grade: A subtle Pixi ColorMatrixFilter contrast/chroma grade protects deep purple richness and prevents bright runtime effects from turning the room pale.
runtime_visual_system.procedural_quality: Ambient particles, cloth, haze, sparks, glass marks, living wall/floor signals, and signature floor circuits use named deterministic seeds.
runtime_visual_system.living_signals: Subtle pistachio/orange/purple room-language marks animate on side structures and the floor anchor, reinforcing an awake private universe without UI, carnival, theater, royal, sacred, or medieval motifs.
runtime_visual_system.cinematic_clarity: Code-generated foreground occlusion and floor gleam reinforce depth, contact, and premium readability while staying behind the character.
runtime_visual_system.idle_motion: A code-generated room-breath field animates vanishing-point ribs, floor pulses, and tiny signal sparks so the scene stays alive even with no cursor movement.
runtime_visual_system.clarity_lane: A code-generated compositing mask enriches side/depth atmosphere while cutting a clean central lane around the subject and floor anchor.
runtime_visual_system.source_policy: Runtime effects are generated in code inside this project; no external runtime assets are required.
